code: (function(){Document.prototype.hasFocus=function(){return true;};window.__sp_popup_log=[];var monitor=new MutationObserver(function(muts){for(var m=0;m<muts.length;m++){if(muts[m].type==='attributes'&&muts[m].target.tagName&&muts[m].target.tagName.toLowerCase()==='tp-yt-iron-dropdown'&&muts[m].attributeName==='aria-hidden'){window.__sp_popup_log.push({val:muts[m].target.getAttribute('aria-hidden'),time:Date.now()});}}});monitor.observe(document.documentElement,{attributes:true,subtree:true,attributeFilter:['aria-hidden']});var items=document.querySelectorAll('ytd-rich-item-renderer');for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){var btn=items[i].querySelector('button[aria-label="\uCD94\uAC00 \uC791\uC5C5"]');if(btn){btn.click();break;}}return 'hasFocus patched + clicked';})()
